mapper.select: SELECT id, activity_id, user_id, signup_status, signup_time, cancel_time, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, deleted, version FROM biz_activity_signup WHERE activity_id = #{activityId} AND user_id = #{userId} AND deleted = 0 LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO biz_activity_signup ( activity_id, user_id, signup_status, signup_time, cancel_time, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, deleted, version ) VALUES ( #{activityId}, #{userId}, #{signupStatus}, #{signupTime}, #{cancelTime}, #{createBy}, NOW(), #{updateBy}, NOW(), 0, 0 )
mapper.update: UPDATE biz_activity_signup SET signup_status = #{signupStatus}, cancel_time = #{cancelTime}, update_by = #{updateBy}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(1) FROM biz_activity_signup WHERE activity_id = #{activityId} AND signup_status = 'SIGNED' AND deleted = 0

SELECT id, activity_id, user_id, signup_status, signup_time, cancel_time, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, deleted, version FROM biz_activity_signup WHERE activity_id = #{activityId} AND deleted = 0 ORDER BY signup_time DESC

SELECT id, activity_id, user_id, signup_status, signup_time, cancel_time, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, deleted, version FROM biz_activity_signup WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND deleted = 0
AND activity_id IN
#{activityId}
ORDER BY signup_time DESC
